mapper.insert: insert into internship_evaluation (student_id, attitude_score, performance_score, report_score, company_evaluation_score, total_score, grade, comment, evaluator_id, evaluate_time, update_time, grade_published) values (#{studentId}, #{attitudeScore}, #{performanceScore}, #{reportScore}, #{companyEvaluationScore}, #{totalScore}, #{grade}, #{comment}, #{evaluatorId}, #{evaluateTime}, #{updateTime}, #{gradePublished})
mapper.select: select ie.*, su.id as su_id, su.name as su_name, su.student_user_id as su_student_id, su.gender as su_gender, su.grade as su_grade, su.major_id as su_major_id, su.class_id as su_class_id, tu.id as tu_id, tu.name as tu_name, tu.teacher_user_id as tu_teacher_user_id from internship_evaluation ie left join student_users su on ie.student_id = su.id left join teacher_users tu on ie.evaluator_id = tu.id where ie.id = #{id}

select ie.*, su.id as su_id, su.name as su_name, su.student_user_id as su_student_id, su.gender as su_gender, su.grade as su_grade, su.major_id as su_major_id, su.class_id as su_class_id, tu.id as tu_id, tu.name as tu_name, tu.teacher_user_id as tu_teacher_user_id from internship_evaluation ie left join student_users su on ie.student_id = su.id left join teacher_users tu on ie.evaluator_id = tu.id where ie.student_id = #{studentId} order by ie.update_time DESC limit 1
mapper.update:
update internship_evaluation
attitude_score = #{attitudeScore},
performance_score = #{performanceScore},
report_score = #{reportScore},
company_evaluation_score = #{companyEvaluationScore},
total_score = #{totalScore},
grade = #{grade},
comment = #{comment},
evaluator_id = #{evaluatorId},
grade_published = #{gradePublished},
update_time = #{updateTime}
where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select ie.*, su.id as su_id, su.name as su_name, su.student_user_id as su_student_id, su.gender as su_gender, su.grade as su_grade, su.major_id as su_major_id, su.class_id as su_class_id, tu.id as tu_id, tu.name as tu_name, tu.teacher_user_id as tu_teacher_user_id from internship_evaluation ie left join student_users su on ie.student_id = su.id left join teacher_users tu on ie.evaluator_id = tu.id order by ie.evaluate_time desc

select ie.*, su.id as su_id, su.name as su_name, su.student_user_id as su_student_id, su.gender as su_gender, su.grade as su_grade, su.major_id as su_major_id, su.class_id as su_class_id, tu.id as tu_id, tu.name as tu_name, tu.teacher_user_id as tu_teacher_user_id from internship_evaluation ie left join student_users su on ie.student_id = su.id left join teacher_users tu on ie.evaluator_id = tu.id where ie.evaluator_id = #{evaluatorId} order by ie.evaluate_time desc
select count(*) from internship_evaluation where evaluator_id = #{evaluatorId}

select ie.*, su.id as su_id, su.name as su_name, su.student_user_id as su_student_id, su.gender as su_gender, su.grade as su_grade, su.major_id as su_major_id, su.class_id as su_class_id, tu.id as tu_id, tu.name as tu_name, tu.teacher_user_id as tu_teacher_user_id from internship_evaluation ie left join student_users su on ie.student_id = su.id left join teacher_users tu on ie.evaluator_id = tu.id where ie.grade = #{grade} order by ie.evaluate_time desc
mapper.update:
update internship_evaluation set grade_published = 1, update_time = NOW() where student_id in
#{id}
